college_info.intro:
Sant Gahira Guru Vishwavidyalaya has a comprehensive collection of courses for students to choose from. The various courses at SGGV Ambikapur are offered through the 7 faculty-departments at the university. Sought-after courses include BEd, BA, MA, MSc, among others. SGGV also offers plenty of Law courses like LLB and LLM, among others. The various departments that offer various courses and specializations at SGGV are listed below:
Department of Farm Forestry
Department of BioTechnology
Department of Environmental Science
Department of Pharmacy
Department of Functional Hindi
Department of Computer Science
Department of Legal Studies
Students can check out the information provided below to learn more about SGGV popular programs:

review_content.General: Students who score a minimum of 50% can take admission to our college. The salary package is around 3.5 LPA. Many placements are conducted, and people from outside the country come here and provide information. Several companies visit the college and offer internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are not available in our college, so students have to rent rooms and live in them. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and well-equipped rooms. Many sports are played, and several students are selected for national and international competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good being located in a rural area.

review_content.Placements: There are no packages offered in our college because our college only provides graduation and post graduation degrees. If anyone wants to join the college, they just have to pay the fee amount and get enrolled. The college is a private college. Course like D.Ed. and B.Ed. will be introduced soon.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no boys hostel, they just have a girls hostel provided. For girls, there are two hostels available out of which they can make a choice. The facilities provided in the labs are good. The library is good and it is not really big, but there are many books available including course books along with department-wise books sections being available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's a pretty good college, but it's a little low in standards.

review_content.Placements: A good number of students study here. There are no placements after B.Sc. No one got the internship. You can study further after obtaining a B.Sc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are good with good facilities, but the classrooms are a little bit dim. Lights don't work often. The library is also kind of dim. The hostel facilities are not that great. Hostel workers are really rude and they scold without any reason every time. Phones are submitted after 8 o'clock. There is no social life available.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers help and some don't. Some are knowledgeable. Many teachers are young and don't have any experience. The course makes students industry-ready. Students have to study well for an exam. It's a bit difficult, but they can get a good percentage if they study well.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to D.Pharma at Sarguja University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for a Diploma in Pharmacy offered by Sarguja University, candidates must have passed class 12 exams with Mathematics, Biology as main subjects with minimum second division. The Sarguja University Diploma courses offer Diploma in Pharmacy to students who pass the qualifying exam. Those who qualify will be able to take admission to the course on merit basis. No entrance test is required.

faqs.question: How to reach SGGV Ambikapur?
faqs.answer: Students enrolled into SGGV can arrive atBirsa Munda Airport, Ranchiand take a few hours' drive to reach the campus of SGGV. AlthoughAmbikapur City Airportis functioning, it may not receive major flights as of now. The closest railway station to the campus isAmbikapurStation, which is around a 15-20-minute drive away from the campus of Sant Gahira Guru Vishwavidyalaya.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sarguja University for admission to BCA?
faqs.answer: Admission in the saguja university is based on the merit score of previous qualifying exam. They accept candidates for BCA admission on their performance in. 12th standard exams or through entrance test. You have to score typically minimum 45 to 50 % marks with mathematics from a recognised board. It's admission process is offline

reviews.review_heading: Best college and good placements for M.Com.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was pretty good. Hostel facilities were moderate, but the food was actually tasty. We played everyday cricket, Kabaddi, and football. On campus, a football ground and a tennis court were available. Indoor game like tennis and chess was provided in college.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college I have ever seen for M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities and infrastructure are acceptable but may be improved. The classrooms are excellent, and the library is well-equipped. The food supplied during the riots was nice, although it might be better. The hotels and dispensaries are satisfactory. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of facilities for the students. There are 2 main libraries, and for my course BCA, there is a computer lab also. There are many Wi-Fi networks with a strong internet connection. In our college hostel, the facilities are so satisfying and worth the money.

reviews.review_heading: Here is my honest review about placement, faculty members, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Every staff and student of the college helped to keep the college campuses clean and tidy. Every classroom here was quite big and each one had air-conditioning and projector facilities. Our college had a big library where a large number of journals, books, and management books were available. There was also a field for sports. There was a canteen for hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: It's one of the best colleges with good placements and a student-friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure of our college is top-class. Our whole hostel campus is divided into three buildings, two allocated for boys and one for girls. The capacity of every hostel is around 150 students. Every hostel room has a light, fan, study table, bathroom, bedstead, and other essential things that a student needs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marian College.
reviews.review_text: The course structure is very good and the college has great facilities. It is a professional course. It enables us to get high-salary jobs. The exams and labs are also not too hectic and also not too super chilled. I would say pretty much fall between. The lab assistants will guide you very well practical. The college provides hostel facilities. The hostel can accommodate around 800 students. Each room consists of three students. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. Mess food is also r...

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Everything in the classroom is finished to perfection. Free Wi-Fi is available for students and staff members in and around the college. There are hostels for both girls and boys near the college. The quality of life offered and the food are good. The college is relatively rigorous and provides students with a positive environment in which to study effectively and appreciatively.

reviews.review_heading: My best experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: There are dormitories and 3 people at a time in a room. The registration process is done soon after we get admission. The meals are very nice and we will get at least everyday nonveg except on Fridays. The college follows outcome-based education, which means we don't follow exactly how the university prepares the curriculum. Our teachers have the power to change their subject's syllabus according to how they want it to be, so the faculty members often change the syllabus to involve current needs...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marian College.
reviews.review_text: Almost all books and journals are accessible in the library. Smart boards along with ICT tools are provided in each classroom.

reviews.review_heading: My best college - An honest review.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, the hostel facilities provided by the college are expensive, and the food quality is poor. The hostel facilities provided are a room for 5-7 people, with an attached bathroom and a good-quality pipe connection. There is no registration fee required to avail of the hostel facility, but renting a room would be fine.

reviews.review_heading: Mess facilities and mess food, followed by its hygiene.
reviews.review_text: Students became eligible in the final year. Wipro, Cisco, etc., usually visited our college. The highest package offered was 40 LPA, and the average package was around 8 LPA. Around 65 to 74% of students were placed, while the rest chose to pursue higher studies.

reviews.review_heading: The ambiance of the college was good, as it is in a hilltop area, which made the atmosphere cool.
reviews.review_text: The hostel warden was not very friendly and was very strict, which made it boring. The rules set by them were too hard to follow. The rooms were good for the fee offered, but there was an issue in the summer as there was no fan in our hostel due to the cool climate.

reviews.review_heading: Living life at 3500ft in the hills of IDUKKI.
reviews.review_text: All amenities are available. Wi-Fi has a full range on campus. Labs, classrooms, libraries, and all are equipped with ICT tools. The hostel also has a Wi-Fi facility. Some cafeteria shos are there inside the hostel itself. Mess is great. It serves traditional Kerala-style food to make us feel at home. Medical facilities are available only till 4 PM. Sports and games are extremely active here, almost every sport has a college team and students can try out for these college teams to advance in the...

reviews.review_heading: I am entirely satisfied with the environment and the course curriculum in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The institution provides a well-structured infrastructure that helps the student in focused learning with adequate facilities and classrooms including Wi-Fi, library access, etc. Hostels provided by the college are also situated inside the campus, which helps students not miss out on campus life and activities.

reviews.review_heading: Best campus environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college offers one of the best infrastructures in the south. All the classrooms, conference halls, and a large library with a huge collection, and dedicated labs are well maintained and with modern technology. There is also a hostel facility with proper mess service. The whole campus is a Wi-Fi-free zone for students. Healthcare is also available. There is also space for outdoor games and activities.

reviews_list.review_title: A college in CU with low fees and good experience.

review_content.Placements: After studying Diploma in Pharmacy placements by the college is not there. You can get yourself a job after 3 months of internship in any hospital after filling out the internship form and getting registered from PCI, Raipur, C. G. The salary can vary here in 'Bilaspur' between Rs.5000 to Rs.11000 per month and it could be more in other cities. The highest paying hospital in Bilaspur's starting salary at present 2022 is Appolo Hospital and its branch pharmacies i.e., Rs.10000- Rs.11000 per month. You can also join a job as MR- Medical Representative for various companies and can get more salary with an increase in workload there will be an increased salary Rs.15000-Rs.40000 per month. Most students got an internship in hospitals like Apollo Multi-speciality Hospital, CIMS Hospital, Star Children Hospital, Mark Hospital, etc. After the D. Pharmacy course you can opt following course/plans for the future like Lateral Entry in B. Pharmacy, Job in any Hospital as a Pharmacist, Job as an MR -Medical Representative, Open Medical Shop i.e., Start your own business, Find a government job opportunity for D. Pharmacy like in SECL, NTPC, Railway, Samvida, etc. If you get this you are among the luckiest ones.

content.Infrastructure: All the facilities were good. Tasty food was served. It was a good campus. Many games were played and cultural programs were organised.
